title.en: Shelter-in-place order amid storm at Azteca before Mexico-England
title.zh-CN: 阿兹特克暴风雨中的就地避难秩序，然后前往墨西哥-英格兰

summary.en: Supporters are told to stay in their seats as an electrical storm approaches Azteca Stadium before Mexico v England in the last 16 of the World Cup.
summary.zh-CN: 在世界杯最后16场比赛中，在墨西哥对阵英格兰之前，当一场电风暴接近阿兹特克体育场时，支持者被告知要留在座位上。

title.en: Haaland sends Norway into quarter-finals as Brazil crash out
title.zh-CN: 在巴西崩溃之际，哈兰德将挪威送入四分之一决赛

summary.en: Erling Haaland scores twice for Norway as they beat Brazil 2-1 at the New York New Jersey Stadium to reach the quarter-finals of the World Cup for the first time.
summary.zh-CN: 埃尔林·哈兰德（ Erling Haaland ）在纽约新泽西体育场（ New York New Jersey Stadium ）以2比1击败巴西队，首次进入世界杯四分之一决赛，为挪威队得分两次。

title.en: Queiroz leaves Ghana following World Cup exit
title.zh-CN: Queiroz在世界杯退出后离开加纳

summary.en: Carlos Queiroz steps down as Ghana head coach after three months in charge following their World Cup exit.
summary.zh-CN: 卡洛斯·奎罗斯（ Carlos Queiroz ）在世界杯退出后担任加纳主教练三个月后辞职。

title.en: Need to stay awake for England v Mexico? Try this quiz
title.zh-CN: 英格兰对墨西哥需要保持清醒吗？试试这个测验

summary.en: England and Thomas Tuchel will want to match the achievements of the nation's famous side that lifted the World Cup trophy in 1966. Can you name every side they have ever faced in the knockouts?
summary.zh-CN: 英格兰和托马斯·图切尔（ Thomas Tuchel ）将希望与1966年举起世界杯奖杯的国家著名球队的成就相提并论。你能说出他们在淘汰赛中遇到的每一方吗？

title.en: Trump thanks Fifa after USA striker Balogun's ban suspended
title.zh-CN: 在美国前锋Balogun的禁令被暂停后，特朗普感谢国际足联

summary.en: Folarin Balogun is available to play for the United States in their World Cup last-16 tie against Belgium after his one-game ban is suspended by Fifa.
summary.zh-CN: Folarin Balogun在国际足联暂停他的一场比赛禁赛后，可以在世界杯最后16场对阵比利时的比赛中为美国队效力。

title.en: Haaland double fires Norway into World Cup quarter-finals
title.zh-CN: 哈兰德将挪威双射入世界杯四分之一决赛

summary.en: Erling Haaland scores twice as Norway knock out five-time champions Brazil, and progress to the quarter-finals of the 2026 World Cup.
summary.zh-CN: Erling Haaland的得分是挪威淘汰五届冠军巴西的两倍，并晋级2026年世界杯四分之一决赛。

title.en: France overcome resolute Paraguay to reach quarter-final
title.zh-CN: 法国战胜坚定的巴拉圭，进入四分之一决赛

summary.en: World Cup favourites France book their quarter-final place thanks to Kylian Mbappe's second-half penalty against a stubborn Paraguay side in Philadelphia.
summary.zh-CN: 由于Kylian Mbappe对费城顽固的巴拉圭队的下半场点球，世界杯最受欢迎的法国队进入了四分之一决赛。

title.en: Mexico could bring the best out of  Tuchel's England
title.zh-CN: 墨西哥可以充分利用图赫尔的英格兰

summary.en: BBC Sport World Cup pundits Thomas Hitzlsperger, Joe Hart and Micah Richards feel the way Mexico play could bring out the best of Thomas Tuchel's England side.
summary.zh-CN: 英国广播公司体育世界杯专家托马斯·希茨尔斯佩格（ Thomas Hitzlsperger ）、乔·哈特（ Joe Hart ）和米卡·理查兹（ Micah Richards ）认为，墨西哥队的比赛方式可以发挥托马斯·图

title.en: Real Madrid sign defender Dumfries from Inter Milan
title.zh-CN: 来自国际米兰的皇家马德里签约后卫邓弗里斯

summary.en: Real Madrid sign Netherlands full-back Denzel Dumfries from Inter Milan on a four-year deal.
summary.zh-CN: 皇家马德里从国际米兰签下荷兰边后卫丹泽尔·邓弗里斯（ Denzel Dumfries ） ，为期四年。

title.en: Mexico return luxury watches gifted by YouTuber
title.zh-CN: 墨西哥回归YouTuber赠送的奢华腕表

summary.en: World Cup co-hosts Mexico - who play England on Sunday night - return luxury watches gifted to them by a content creator because Fifa rules prohibit expensive gifts.
summary.zh-CN: 世界杯联合主办方墨西哥（周日晚上与英格兰队比赛）退回了内容创作者赠送给他们的奢侈手表，因为国际足联的规定禁止赠送昂贵的礼物。

title.en: France survive Paraguay's 'disgraceful' and 'embarrassing' dark arts
title.zh-CN: 法国在巴拉圭的“可耻”和“尴尬”的黑魔法中幸存下来

summary.en: After dismantling all before them at this World Cup, France had to find a new way to win against a Paraguay side whose use of the dark arts angered many of those watching.
summary.zh-CN: 在本届世界杯上拆除了他们面前的所有人之后，法国不得不寻找一种新的方式来战胜巴拉圭方面，巴拉圭方面使用黑魔法激怒了许多观众。

title.en: England enter the Azteca - where football kings are crowned
title.zh-CN: 英格兰进入阿兹特克--足球之王加冕之地

summary.en: BBC Sport explores the history and cultural power of the Azteca, one of the great cathedrals of world football, as England prepare to face Mexico there in the last 16 of the World Cup.
summary.zh-CN: 英国广播公司体育频道探索世界足球大教堂之一阿兹特克的历史和文化力量，因为英格兰准备在世界杯的最后16场比赛中面对墨西哥。

title.en: Mexico vs England: Quansah in at right-back, Saka & Gordon start
title.zh-CN: 墨西哥对英格兰：昆萨在右后卫，萨卡和戈登首发

title.en: Brazil stunned as Haaland's masterclass sends Norway into last eight
title.zh-CN: 巴西惊呆了，因为哈兰德的大师班将挪威送入了最后八名

summary.en: Erling Haaland dumped Brazil out of the World Cup at the last-16 stage as his brilliant late double secured a 2-1 win for Norway to set up a quarter-final against England or Mexico.
summary.zh-CN: 埃尔林·哈兰德（ Erling Haaland ）在最后16个阶段将巴西从世界杯中淘汰出局，因为他出色的后期双打为挪威赢得了2-1的胜利，在对阵英格兰或墨西哥的比赛中取得了四分之一决赛。

title.en: England and Mexico arrive at Azteca after storm delay
title.zh-CN: 英格兰和墨西哥在风暴延迟后抵达阿兹特克

title.en: Haaland strikes late for Norway to send Brazil crashing out LIVE!
Golden Boot race: Haaland moves level with Mbappe and Messi

summary.en: Erling Haaland has moved level with Kylian Mbappe and Lionel Messi in the race for the Golden Boot at the 2026 World Cup.
